name: West Fraser Timber Co. Ltd.
description: West Fraser Timber Co. Ltd. is a diversified wood products company headquartered in Vancouver, Canada. Founded in 1955, the company operates more than 50 facilities across Canada, the United States, the United Kingdom, and Europe. West Fraser is a leading producer of lumber, oriented strand board (OSB), laminated veneer lumber (LVL), medium-density fibreboard (MDF), plywood, pulp, and newsprint. The company is committed to sustainable forest management and responsible manufacturing practices, playing a significant role in the global supply of wood products for residential and commercial construction, as well as industrial applications.
